introText: {{claimantName}} has made a property possession claim against you. These are their answers to the questions they were asked when making their claim.
introTextFallback: A property possession claim has been made against you. These are the claimant's answers to the questions they were asked when making their claim.
claimPdfSectionTitle: Download a PDF copy of the claim
documentsHelpSummary: If you cannot find a document that you are looking for in this section
documentsHelpText: All documents uploaded by you or the claimant are on the Documents page.
documentsHelpTextBeforeLink: All documents uploaded by you or the claimant are on the
closeAndReturn: Close and return to case overview
statementOfTruthBody: I believe the facts stated in this claim form are true. I understand that proceedings for contempt of court may be brought against anyone who makes, or causes to be made, a false statement in a document verified by a statement of truth without an honest belief in its truth.

sections.asb: Alleged antisocial behaviour and illegal or prohibited conduct
sections.actionTaken: Action already taken by the claimant
sections.tenancyDetails: Tenancy, occupation contract or licence details
sections.underlesseeTriage: Underlessees or mortgagees entitled to claim relief against forfeiture

labels.isExemptLandlord: Is the claimant an exempt landlord under Part 1 of the Housing (Wales) Act 2014?
labels.defendantAddressKnown: Additional defendant’s address for service known?
labels.trespassClaim: Is your claim a trespass claim?
labels.propertyAddress: Address of the property the claimant is seeking possession of
labels.hasGrounds: Does the claimant have grounds for possession?
labels.reasonForGround: Reason for claiming possession under ground {{ground}}
labels.whyClaimingPossession: Why is the claimant claiming possession?
labels.otherInfoAboutReasons: Is there any other information the claimant wants to provide about their reasons for possession?
labels.isASB: Is it alleged that there is actual or threatened antisocial behaviour?
labels.asbDetails: Details of alleged actual or threatened antisocial behaviour
labels.isIllegalPurposes: Is it alleged that there is actual or threatened use of the premises for illegal purposes?
labels.illegalPurposesDetails: Details of alleged actual or threatened use of the premises for illegal purposes
labels.isOtherProhibitedConduct: Is it alleged that there has been other prohibited conduct?
labels.otherProhibitedConductDetails: Details of other alleged prohibited conduct
labels.totalRentArrears: Total rent arrears at time of issue
labels.previousSteps: Have there been previous steps taken to recover rent arrears?
labels.previousStepsDetails: Details of previous steps taken to recover rent arrears
labels.judgmentRequested: Judgment requested for the outstanding arrears?
labels.preActionProtocol: Has the pre-action protocol been followed?
labels.preActionProtocolReason: Why has the pre-action protocol not been followed?
labels.settlementAttempted: Has a settlement tried to be reached?
labels.noticeNotServedReason: Statement of why notice has not been served
labels.noticePersonName: Name of person the notice was left with
labels.noticeEmailAddress: Email address the notice was served to
labels.noticeOtherElectronic: Details of how the notice was served by other electronic method
labels.noticeOtherMeans: Details of how the notice was served by other means
labels.canUploadNotice: Can the claimant upload a copy of the notice served?
labels.cannotUploadNoticeReason: Why can the claimant not upload a copy of the notice served?
labels.tenancyType: What type of tenancy, occupation contract or licence is in place, or was in place?
labels.tenancyStartDate: Tenancy, occupation contract or licence start date
labels.tenancyCopy: Does the claimant have a copy of the tenancy, occupation contract or licence agreement?
labels.tenancyNoCopyReason: Why does the claimant not have a copy of the tenancy, occupation contract or licence agreement?
labels.tenancyDocument: Tenancy, occupation contract or licence agreement
labels.claimantCircumstancesQuestion: Is there any information the claimant wants to provide about their circumstances?
labels.defendantCircumstancesQuestion: Is there any information the claimant is required to provide, or wants to provide about the defendants’ circumstances?
labels.hasUnderlesseeOrMortgagee: Is there an underlessee or mortgagee entitled to claim relief against forfeiture?
labels.demotionQuestion: In the alternative to possession, is the claimant asking the court to order demotion of tenancy?
labels.demotionHousingAct: Which section of the Housing Act is the demotion of tenancy claim made under?
labels.demotionStatement: Has the claimant served a statement of express terms on the defendants which will apply to the demoted tenancy?
labels.demotionReason: Reasons for requesting demotion of tenancy
labels.suspensionQuestion: In the alternative to possession, is the claimant asking the court to order suspension of right to buy?
labels.suspensionHousingAct: Which section of the Housing Act is the suspension of right to buy claim made under?
labels.suspensionReason: Reasons for requesting a suspension of right to buy
labels.prohibitedConductQuestion: Is the claimant seeking an order imposing a prohibited standard contract?
labels.prohibitedConductAgreement: Has the claimant and the contract holder agreed terms of the periodic standard contract in addition to those incorporated by statute?
labels.prohibitedConductReason: Why is the claimant making this claim?
labels.epcQuestion: Can the claimant upload a copy of the energy performance certificate?
labels.epcReason: Why can the claimant not upload a copy of the energy performance certificate?
labels.gasQuestion: Can the claimant upload a copy of the current gas safety report?
labels.gasReason: Why can the claimant not upload a copy of the current gas safety report?
labels.eicrQuestion: Can the claimant upload a copy of the current Electrical Installation Condition Report (EICR)?
labels.eicrReason: Why can the claimant not upload a copy of the current Electrical Installation Condition Report (EICR)?
labels.assuredNoArrearsReasonsMinisterOfReligio: Property required for minister of religion (ground 5)
labels.assuredNoArrearsReasonsNoRightToRent: Tenant does not have a right to rent (ground 7B)
labels.assuredNoArrearsReasonsNuisanceOrIllegal: Nuisance, annoyance, illegal or immoral use of the property (ground 14)
labels.assuredNoArrearsReasonsPropertyDeteriora: Deterioration in the condition of the property (ground 13)
labels.assuredNoArrearsReasonsRepossessionByLen: Repossession by the landlord's mortgage lender (ground 2)
labels.walesFailToGiveUpS170Reason: Failure to give up possession on date specified in contract-holder's notice (section 170)
labels.walesFailToGiveUpBreakNoticeS191Reason: Failure to give up possession on date specified in contract-holder's break clause notice (section 191)
labels.walesLandlordNoticeFtEndS186Reason: Landlord's notice in connection with end of fixed term given (section 186)
labels.walesLandlordBreakClauseS199Reason: Notice given under a landlord's break clause (section 199)
labels.walesSecureFailureToGiveUpPossessionSect: Failure to give up possession on date specified in contract-holder's notice (section 170)
Failure to give up possession on date specified in contract-holder's break clause notice (section 191)
labels.walesSecureLandlordNoticeSection186Reaso: Landlord's notice in connection with end of fixed term given (section 186)
labels.walesSecureLandlordNoticeSection199Reaso: Notice given under a landlord's break clause (section 199)
